reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar y descansar. Los baños muy limpios!!!! La atención muy buena.

Excellent place to stop and rest. The bathrooms are very clean! The service is excellent.

reviews.comment:
El echo de ser del acá te da un plus, pero como estación de servicio, deja mucho que desear, te venden 3 medidas de café, chico, mediano y grande, no son los vasos de YPF. Y no encontré los vasos chicos, medianos y grandes, osea trabajan con una sola medida y te atienden de muy mala gana

(Translated by Google)
The fact that it's local gives you a plus, but as a gas station, it leaves much to be desired. They sell you three sizes of coffee: small, medium, and large; they're not YPF cups. And I couldn't find the small, medium, and large cups; they only work with one size and serve you very grudgingly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNalpYNFVBEAE
